wrapper: bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-800/50 sticky top-0 z-50

menu.item: text-gray-300 hover:text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors

search.button: p-2 rounded-full transition-colors text-gray-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10
search.form: absolute top-full right-0 mt-2 w-72 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg shadow-xl border border-gray-700 p-4 z-50
search.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-600 rounded-md bg-white/5 text-gray-100 placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-purple-500

currency.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-colors
currency.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-32 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md shadow-lg ring-1 ring-gray-700 ring-opacity-50 z-50
currency.option: block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-300 transition-colors

language.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-colors
language.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-40 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md rounded-md shadow-lg ring-1 ring-gray-700 ring-opacity-50 z-50
language.option: block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-300 transition-colors

cart.count: absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full h-5 w-5 flex items-center justify-center

menu.wrapper: lg:hidden fixed left-0 right-0 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out
menu.item: block py-3 px-4 text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-800 border-b border-gray-700 last:border-0

mobile.backdrop: lg:hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-[98]

cart.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl border-l border-gray-700/50 z-[100] transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out
cart.iconWrapper: w-8 h-8 bg-white/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center
cart.title: text-lg font-medium text-white
cart.emptyWrap: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center
cart.emptyIconWrap: w-20 h-20 bg-white/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4
cart.itemCard: group bg-white/5 rounded-xl border border-gray-700/50 p-4 hover:border-gray-600 transition-all duration-200
cart.itemImage: w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded-lg border border-gray-700/50
cart.qtyBadge: absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-blue-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
cart.itemTitle: font-semibold text-white text-sm leading-tight mb-1 line-clamp-2
cart.qtyWrap: flex items-center gap-1 bg-white/10 rounded-lg p-1
cart.qtyBtn: w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20 rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors text-white
cart.removeBtn: p-1.5 text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200
cart.checkoutBtn: w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600 text-white px-6 py-4 rounded-xl hover:from-purple-500 hover:to-blue-500 transition-all duration-200 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-3 font-semibold text-lg
cart.trustWrap: flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-700
